channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump gives GOP senators no set strategy as Republican leaders struggle to craft his priorities
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump likes the idea of “one, big beautiful bill" for his top legislative priorities, but he emerged from a lengthy closed-door meeting with Republican senators late Wednesday open to other strategies as GOP leaders strain to develop a plan before the party g
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO and KEVIN FREKING, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump details strategy to get necessary votes with one-bill approach to border, taxes
item.description: Republicans are getting to work on one reconciliation bill on both the border and taxes, as Trump wants, after the president pointed to the strategy behind it in a meeting.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Republican AGs double down on Biden administration lawsuits as president prepares to leave office
item.description: Utah Attorney General Sean Reyes and Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton are suing the Biden administration over energy-efficient housing standards, claiming they hinder affordable housing and exceed legal limits.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ohio Supreme Court hears arguments in watchdog group's records dispute with state attorney general
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (AP) — The Ohio Supreme Court heard oral arguments Wednesday in a long-running public records case pitting the state’s top law enforcement officer against a national watchdog group that is digging into his ties with the Republican Attorneys General Association.
item.dc:creator: JULIE CARR SMYTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: MAGAfest Destiny? Trump flexes his muscles with repeated talk of American expansionism
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump's turning up the volume on his calls to acquire Greenland, regain control of the Panama Canal and make Canada the nation's 51st state are forcing world leaders to react and respond, and likely will foreshadow the blunt effect his second administration will have
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Senate approves committee assignments, tees up confirmation hearings next week
item.description: The Senate on Tuesday approved its organizing resolution for the 119th Congress, officially setting the composition of committees and greenlighting nomination hearings to take place in the coming weeks.
item.dc:creator: Al Weaver, NewsNation

item.title: Meta ending 3rd-party fact checkers 'transformative,' but other legal issues remain, says expert
item.description: Facebook's new content moderation modeled after X's "Community Notes" has been praised by free speech advocates but is unlikely to ease legal liability for Meta.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Justice Department says it plans to release only part of special counsel's Trump report for now
item.description: The Justice Department said Wednesday that it will release special counsel Jack Smith’s findings on Donald Trump’s efforts to undo the results of the 2020 presidential election but will keep under wraps for now the rest of the record focused on the president-elect's hoarding of classified documents
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Top Republicans roll out bill that would undo 9/11 plea deals
item.description: Top Republicans in Congress are introducing a new bill to stop the White House from offering plea deals to suspected 9/11 terrorists.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Drug dealers could be charged with murder under new Virginia fentanyl plan
item.description: Virginia Republicans, facing a one-seat minority, hope to tackle the fentanyl crisis with stringent punishments including murder charges for some drug dealers, lawmakers say.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Carter and Biden's long friendship had wrinkles. It will be on display a final time with a eulogy
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Joe Biden is the consummate Washington insider. Jimmy Carter was anything but. Yet the 46th and 39th U.S.
item.dc:creator: BILL BARROW and DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-FBI informant who fabricated bribery story about Biden and his son Hunter gets 6 years in prison
item.description: A former FBI informant who fabricated a story about President Joe Biden and his son Hunter accepting bribes has been sentenced to six years in prison.
item.dc:creator: Alanna Durkin Richer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Biden says he could've beaten Trump in November
item.description: President Joe Biden said early Wednesday that he thinks he would have beaten President-elect Donald Trump if he stuck with his reelection bid in an interview with USA Today.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: McDonald's rolls back diversity goals
item.description: Fast food giant McDonald’s has become the latest company to roll back diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) commitments following the Supreme Court’s 2023 decision ending affirmative action in college admissions.
item.dc:creator: Cheyanne M. Daniels, NewsNation

item.title: Biden administration asks court to block plea deal for alleged mastermind of 9/11 attacks
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Biden administration asked a federal appeals court on Tuesday to block a plea agreement for accused 9/11 mastermind Khalid Sheikh Mohammed that would spare him the risk of the death penalty in one of the deadliest attacks ever on the United States.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER and ELLEN KNICKMEYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump refuses to rule out use of military force to take control of Greenland and the Panama Canal
item.description: PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump on Tuesday said he would not rule out the use of military force to seize control of the Panama Canal and Greenland, as he declared U.S. control of both to be vital to American national security.
item.dc:creator: WILL WEISSERT and ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Disgraced former US Rep. George Santos seeks to delay fraud sentencing to make more podcast episodes
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Disgraced former congressman George Santos has asked a New York judge to delay his sentencing on federal fraud charges until the summer so he can pay off more than half a million dollars in fines by making more episodes of his recently launched podcast “Pants on Fire.
item.dc:creator: PHILIP MARCELO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 2 death row inmates reject Biden's commutation of sentences
item.description: Shannon Agofsky and Len Davis believe the life sentences put them at a legal disadvantage with them planning to seek appeals based on claims of innocence.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, NewsNation

item.title: NY governor proposes $110 million for new child care centers
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- Continuing a theme of proposing splashy and spendy new proposals aimed at keeping families in New York, Gov. Kathy Hochul took aim at the lack of child care centers Tuesday. Hochul wants to create a $110 million fund to support the construction of new child care facilities.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: In last address, St. Cloud’s long-serving mayor hails community support
item.description: Dave Kleis served nearly 20 years and oversaw major changes in the city, including new growth and changing demographics. He will step down next week when Mayor-elect Jake Anderson is sworn in.
item.dc:creator: Kirsti Marohn, MPR News

item.title: Trump won't commit to not using military to get Panama Canal
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump on Tuesday refused to commit to not using the U.S. military to gain control of the Panama Canal, after vowing last month to take over the operation of the key passageway.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: What to know about Trump and his keen interest in Greenland
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has said multiple times that the U.S. should buy Greenland, an autonomous territory of Denmark. The sparsely populated island is geopolitically important and mineral-rich.
item.dc:creator: Chandelis Duster, MPR News

item.title: Exxon sues California AG for defamation after he sued them for 'misleading' plastic recycling claims
item.description: A major oil company has responded to California Attorney General Rob Bonta with a lawsuit alleging defamation after he accused them of misleading customers.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, Fox 5

item.title: Curator talks archiving Walz’s bid for VP, preserving political legacies
item.description: While brief, Gov. Tim Walz’s bid for vice president will add another chapter to his legacy in politics, and the Minnesota Historical Society has gotten a jumpstart on preserving it.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer and Gracie Stockton, MPR News

item.title: Judge grants media requests to record Minnesota senator’s burglary trial
item.description: Minnesota Sen. Nicole Mitchell is set to stand trial later this month on a burglary charge. A Becker County judge on Tuesday ruled that the proceedings can be recorded by media organizations with some limitations.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson, MPR News

item.title: Trump Jr. plans Greenland visit after father stirs controversy
item.description: Donald Trump Jr. is planning to head to Greenland for a day-long trip just weeks after his father, President-elect Trump, said U.S. ownership of the Danish territory "is an absolute necessity.
item.dc:creator: Sarakshi Rai, Fox 5

item.title: Bill O'Reilly was in a 'Cabinet meeting' during Mar-a-lago visit
item.description: While Trump's approach is high-risk, O'Reilly argues it reflects his commitment to his agenda and disregard for political norms.
item.dc:creator: Leland Vittert, NewsNation

item.title: Minnesota Office of Cannabis Management will get new interim director
item.description: The interim director of the Minnesota Office of Cannabis Management, who has led the office since it was created, is stepping down.
item.dc:creator: MPR News Staff, MPR News

item.title: Trump pitches 'merged' US, Canada after Trudeau resignation announcement
item.description: After Trudeau’s announcement Monday, Trump touted the idea that many Canadians would “LOVE” the idea of being the "51st State" of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Canadian PM Justin Trudeau resigns
item.description: Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau announced his resignation Monday in the face of rising discontent over his leadership, and after the abrupt departure of his finance minister signaled growing turmoil within his government.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Nippon, U.S. Steel file suit after Biden administration blocks $15 billion deal
item.description: Nippon Steel and U.S. Steel are filing a federal lawsuit challenging the Biden administration’s decision to block a proposed nearly $15 billion deal for Nippon to acquire Pittsburgh-based U.S. Steel.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Biden bans new offshore oil and gas drilling in most federal waters
item.description: President Joe Biden is moving to ban new offshore oil and gas drilling in most U.S. coastal waters, an effort to block possible action by the incoming Trump administration to expand offshore drilling.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Sales of Minnesota blackout license plates exceed 250,000 in first year
item.description: More than a quarter-million vehicles in the state now have the plates featuring a simple design of white letters and numbers on a black background.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Krueger, MPR News

item.title: With Board Chair Nora Vargas ending her term, here's who's vying to replace her
item.description: As of Friday, there are four people who have shown interest in running to replace Chair Nora Vargas on the San Diego County Board of Supervisors at the end of her term.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Republican Mike Johnson reelected House speaker vote after dramatic floor vote
item.description: Republican Mike Johnson has won re-election to House speakership on first-round voting. He pushed past GOP holdout and got a boost from President-elect Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News
